quotes.text: Some people, when confronted with a problem, think 'I know, I'll use regular expressions.' Now they have two problems.
quotes.author: Jamie Zawinski

quotes.text: Every Junior Dev: 'I'll just use a regex for this.' Every Senior Dev: 'I'll just use a regex for this.' Every Staff Dev: 'I'll just use a regex for this.' None of them have learned.
quotes.author: based
